code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    atr_mult = params['atr_multiplier']
    range_threshold = params['range_threshold']
    df = df.copy()
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(high=df['high'], low=df['low'], close=df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    df['prev_high'] = df['high'].shift(1)
    df['prev_low'] = df['low'].shift(1)
    df['inside_day'] = (df['high'] <= df['prev_high']) & (df['low'] >= df['prev_low'])
    df['inside_range'] = df['high'] - df['low']
    df['valid_inside'] = df['inside_day'] & (df['inside_range'] < range_threshold * df['atr'])
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index, dtype='int')
    position = 0
    entry_price = 0.0
    highest_since_entry = 0.0
    lowest_since_entry = 0.0
    atr_at_entry = 0.0
    for i in range(1, len(df)):
        if position == 0:
            if df['valid_inside'].iloc[i-1]:
                if df['close'].iloc[i] > df['prev_high'].iloc[i]:
                    position = 1
                    entry_price = df['close'].iloc[i]
                    highest_since_entry = entry_price
                    atr_at_entry = df['atr'].iloc[i]
                    signals.iloc[i] = 1
                elif df['close'].iloc[i] < df['prev_low'].iloc[i]:
                    position = -1
                    entry_price = df['close'].iloc[i]
                    lowest_since_entry = entry_price
                    atr_at_entry = df['atr'].iloc[i]
                    signals.iloc[i] = -1
        elif position == 1:
            if df['high'].iloc[i] > highest_since_entry:
                highest_since_entry = df['high'].iloc[i]
            stop_price = highest_since_entry - atr_mult * atr_at_entry
            if df['close'].iloc[i] <= stop_price:
                position = 0
            elif df['close'].iloc[i] < df['prev_low'].iloc[i]:
                position = 0
            signals.iloc[i] = 0
        elif position == -1:
            if df['low'].iloc[i] < lowest_since_entry:
                lowest_since_entry = df['low'].iloc[i]
            stop_price = lowest_since_entry + atr_mult * atr_at_entry
            if df['close'].iloc[i] >= stop_price:
                position = 0
            elif df['close'].iloc[i] > df['prev_high'].iloc[i]:
                position = 0
            signals.iloc[i] = 0
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: Inside days indicate consolidation; breakouts from narrow ranges in AUD/USD often lead to short-term directional persistence, while ATR trailing stops manage risk and allow profits to run.
